name_en: M69831 Black! The Aerogram Long Wallet reinterprets traditional men's accessories with a contemporary minimalist design. Crafted from microfiber black calfskin, it is as soft as the historic Aerogram, featuring a discreet black metal LV logo and a practical detachable wrist strap. Generous capacity with a fan-fold main compartment, 12 credit card slots, and an extra flap pocket for various items. Size: 20 x 11 x 2.5 cm.
